service.name: corewaf-bridge
service.description: Phase 2 bridge stack — caddy-internal (docker-label proxy + ACME), caddy-bridge (operator action listener), alloy (telemetry), valkey (state). Launched by `orchestrator compose up` from the foundation tier (waf/corewaf-starter-kit/compose.yml's `orchestrator` service) once `tunnel` is healthy.

variables._CADDY_INTERNAL_TODO_: Stand-in. The corewaf services/core build of caddy-docker-proxy lives only in GitLab today; switch back to ghcr.io/ext-corero/waf/caddy-docker-proxy once services/core ships GHCR publishing.
